"""Customer support agent with LangChain."""
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import create_react_agent, AgentExecutor
from langchain.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from src.tools.search import search_knowledge_base
from src.tools.ticketing import create_ticket

# Initialize the LLM
llm = ChatOpenAI(
    model="gpt-4",
    temperature=0.7
)

# Create the agent
support_agent = create_react_agent(
    llm=llm,
    tools=[search_knowledge_base, create_ticket],
    prompt=ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
        ("system", "You are a helpful customer support agent."),
        ("human", "{input}")
    ])
)

# Create executor
executor = AgentExecutor(
    agent=support_agent,
    tools=[search_knowledge_base, create_ticket],
    verbose=True
)

def handle_query(query: str) -> str:
    return executor.invoke({"input": query})

"""Knowledge base search tool."""
from langchain.tools import tool
from src.vectorstore.index import query_vectorstore

@tool
def search_knowledge_base(query: str) -> str:
    """Search the internal knowledge base for relevant information.
    
    Args:
        query: The search query
    
    Returns:
        Relevant information from the knowledge base
    """
    results = query_vectorstore(query)
    return "\n".join([doc.page_content for doc in results])

"""Support ticketing tool."""
from langchain.tools import tool
import uuid

@tool
def create_ticket(title: str, description: str, priority: str = "medium") -> str:
    """Create a new support ticket.
    
    Args:
        title: Ticket title
        description: Detailed description of the issue
        priority: Priority level (low, medium, high)
    
    Returns:
        Ticket ID
    """
    ticket_id = str(uuid.uuid4())[:8]
    # In production, this would create a ticket in the system
    return f"Ticket created: {ticket_id}"

"""System prompts for agents."""
from langchain.prompts import SystemMessagePromptTemplate

support_system_prompt = SystemMessagePromptTemplate.from_template(
    """You are a helpful customer support agent for TechCorp.

Your responsibilities:
1. Answer customer questions accurately
2. Search the knowledge base for information
3. Create support tickets when needed
4. Escalate complex issues to human agents

Be polite, professional, and helpful.
Always verify information before providing it.
If unsure, offer to create a ticket for follow-up.
"""
)

escalation_prompt = """This issue requires human attention.
Please create a ticket and inform the customer that a specialist will follow up.
"""

"""Tools package."""
from .search import search_knowledge_base
from .ticketing import create_ticket
